---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve web-audit-cli
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run command: `web-audit --url ... --modules ...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages if applicable.

## Environment

- **Node.js version**: (run `node -v`)
- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 14.0, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)
- **Chrome/Chromium installed**: Yes / No
- **Docker installed**: Yes / No
- **web-audit-cli version**: (run `web-audit --version` or check package.json)

## CLI Options Used

```bash
web-audit --url <url> --modules <modules> --format <format> ...
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (screenshots, log output with `--verbose`, etc.).
